What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A white cardboard toilet paper roll and black-handled scissors rest on a blue construction paper sheet atop a light brown wooden table. An Alcan foil box sits at the top edge of the frame while text lists materials needed. A person wearing a dark blue shirt holds a cluster of colorful markers over black paper then rotates the white tube with both hands to show its hollow interior.
